category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Kazakhstan / EAEU EAC and energy-efficiency requirements.

title.en: China-to-Kazakhstan Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入哈萨克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入哈薩克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Kazakhstan / EAEU market-access requirements: the EAC conformity mark under TR CU 004/2011 (LVD) and TR CU 020/2011 (EMC), GOST IEC 60335-2-24 safety, the EAEU energy-efficiency label, R-600a refrigerant handling, and the in-country importer / registration requirement.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与哈萨克斯坦／EAEU市场准入要求差距对照：TR CU 004/2011（低压）和TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）项下的EAC合格标志、GOST IEC 60335-2-24安全、EAEU能效标签、R-600a制冷剂处理及在境内进口商／注册要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與哈薩克／EAEU市場准入要求差距對照：TR CU 004/2011（低壓）和TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）項下的EAC合格標誌、GOST IEC 60335-2-24安全、EAEU能效標籤、R-600a製冷劑處理及在境內進口商／登記要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current EAEU Technical Regulations, ST RK / GOST standards, EAC conformity procedures, energy-efficiency provisions, and in-country importer requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement in Kazakhstan.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在向哈萨克斯坦出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行EAEU技术法规、ST RK／GOST标准、EAC合格评定程序、能效条款及境内进口商要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在向哈薩克出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行EAEU技術法規、ST RK／GOST標準、EAC合格評定程序、能效條款及境內進口商要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four main Kazakhstan / EAEU compliance gaps: (1) the EAC conformity mark — electrical safety must be assessed under TR CU 004/2011 against GOST IEC 60335-2-24, and EMC under TR CU 020/2011; CCC / GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted; (2) EAC conformity is issued by an EAEU-accredited certification body, with certificate / declaration registration in the EAEU register; (3) EAEU energy-efficiency labelling applies and differs from China's GB 12021.2 grade; (4) an in-country (Kazakhstan / EAEU) importer or applicant established in the Union is required to hold the EAC certificate. The 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China, so no voltage / frequency re-engineering is needed, and R-600a is well-positioned but charge documentation against GOST IEC 60335-2-24 must be verified.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大哈萨克斯坦／EAEU合规差距：（1）EAC合格标志——电气安全须依据TR CU 004/2011按GOST IEC 60335-2-24评定，电磁兼容须依据TR CU 020/2011评定；CCC／GB 4706.13认证不被接受；（2）EAC合格评定须由EAEU认可的认证机构出具，并在EAEU注册系统登记证书／声明；（3）EAEU能效标识适用，且与中国GB 12021.2等级不同；（4）须有在联盟境内（哈萨克斯坦／EAEU）设立的进口商或申请人持有EAC证书。220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国一致，因此无需电压／频率重新设计；R-600a具备良好条件，但须核实充注量文件是否符合GOST IEC 60335-2-24。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大哈薩克／EAEU合規差距：（1）EAC合格標誌——電氣安全須依據TR CU 004/2011按GOST IEC 60335-2-24評定，電磁相容須依據TR CU 020/2011評定；CCC／GB 4706.13認證不被接受；（2）EAC合格評定須由EAEU認可的認證機構出具，並在EAEU登記系統登記證書／聲明；（3）EAEU能效標識適用，且與中國GB 12021.2等級不同；（4）須有在聯盟境內（哈薩克／EAEU）設立的進口商或申請人持有EAC證書。220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國一致，因此無需電壓／頻率重新設計；R-600a具備良好條件，但須核實充注量文件是否符合GOST IEC 60335-2-24。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official EAEU Commission, ST RK / GOST standards bodies, and accredited certification body sources are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
